# Black Diamond Cleaning Solutions LLC — Full AI Reference

## Overview
Black Diamond Cleaning Solutions LLC is a premium house cleaning service founded by Joe, a rental property owner who experienced firsthand the frustrations of unreliable cleaning services. The company was built to solve those problems: missed appointments, inconsistent quality, and poor communication. In over a year of operation, Black Diamond has served 500+ customers and earned a 4.9-star Google rating.

**Business Type:** House Cleaning Service (HouseCleaningService)
**Service Model:** Mobile — we come to you. No storefront.
**Service Territory:** Pennsylvania and New York
**Phone:** (215) 650-3101
**Email:** info@blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM–6:00 PM; Saturday 9:00 AM–4:00 PM; Sunday closed
**Website:** https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com
**Google Business Profile:** https://share.google/KuJi4x8bZufInyUMT
**Licensed & Insured:** Yes — fully licensed and insured for both residential and commercial cleaning.

---

## Services

### Standard Cleaning
Our consistent, professional whole-home cleaning — perfect for maintaining a freshly cleaned home. Includes dusting all accessible surfaces, vacuuming carpets and rugs, sweeping and mopping hard floors, sanitizing kitchen counters and stovetop, scrubbing bathrooms (toilets, showers, sinks, mirrors), emptying trash, making beds, and wiping down light switches, door handles, and baseboards. Most homes take 2–4 hours depending on size and condition. Free quotes; pricing varies by home size. Clients do not need to provide supplies.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/standard-cleaning

### Deep Cleaning
A top-to-bottom intensive clean that tackles baseboards, grout, inside appliances (oven, fridge), light fixtures, ceiling fans, and interior windows. Includes everything in Standard Cleaning plus detailed kitchen (backsplash, cabinet fronts, under small appliances), detailed bathroom scrubbing (tile grout, shower tracks, behind toilet), and detailed vacuuming under and around furniture. Ideal for first-time clients, seasonal refreshes, or before starting a recurring plan. New customers save 15% on their first deep cleaning — mention the offer when requesting a quote.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/deep-cleaning

### Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning
Transition-ready cleaning for empty homes — renters getting deposits back, sellers prepping a listing, landlords turning units, and Airbnb hosts resetting properties. Includes inside all cabinets, drawers, and closets; inside oven, fridge, microwave, and dishwasher; all baseboards, door frames, and window sills; interior windows and glass surfaces; detailed bathroom scrubbing including tile and grout; vacuum and mop entire floor plan; and garage sweep-out upon request. Thorough enough to pass standard landlord inspections. Often schedulable within 48 hours.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/move-in-move-out-cleaning

### Recurring Cleaning
Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly recurring cleaning at a discounted rate vs. one-time service. Includes all Standard Cleaning services on the client's chosen schedule, same assigned cleaning team whenever possible, priority scheduling over one-time customers, easy rescheduling via text or phone, and flexible frequency adjustments any time. No contract — cancel or change frequency at any time. Most families choose bi-weekly; weekly is popular for busy households with pets and kids.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/recurring-cleaning

### Commercial Cleaning
Residential-quality cleaning for small offices, medical suites, salons, boutique retail, fitness studios, and other commercial spaces typically under 10,000 square feet. Includes dusting and sanitizing workstations, reception, and common areas; cleaning and sanitizing break rooms and kitchenettes; thorough restroom cleaning and restocking; vacuuming carpets; sweeping and mopping hard floors; glass and interior window cleaning; trash removal and liner replacement. After-hours and weekend availability. Fully insured for commercial work. Direct communication — no call centers.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/commercial-cleaning

---

## Service Areas

### State College, PA
Serving Penn State faculty, downtown homeowners, and landlords managing student rentals across Centre County. Black Diamond offers flexible scheduling around the academic calendar and move-in weekends, with expertise in student-rental turnovers. Nearby areas served: Bellefonte, Boalsburg, Port Matilda, Philipsburg.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/state-college-pa

### Scranton, PA
Cleaning historic homes in the Hill Section, modern builds in Dunmore, and Airbnbs across Lackawanna County. Experienced with older homes and reliable through all weather conditions. Trusted by Lackawanna County Airbnb hosts for quick turnovers. Nearby: Dunmore, Clarks Summit, Moosic, Dickson City.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/scranton-pa

### Altoona, PA
Locally trusted across Blair County for homes, renters, and small commercial spaces. Flexible scheduling for working families and same-day availability for many cleaning types. Nearby: Hollidaysburg, Duncansville, Tyrone, Bellwood.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/altoona-pa

### Harrisburg, PA
Serving Pennsylvania's capital region and Dauphin County — homeowners, state employees, and downtown condo residents. Discreet, professional service for busy professionals. Trusted by Dauphin County property managers. Nearby: Hershey, Camp Hill, Mechanicsburg, Lemoyne.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/harrisburg-pa

### Williamsport, PA
Premium residential cleaning for Williamsport and Lycoming County, including careful service for Victorian-era and historic properties. Reliable year-round including holiday weeks. Trusted by local real estate professionals for listing preps. Nearby: Montoursville, South Williamsport, Loyalsock, Jersey Shore.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/williamsport-pa

### Erie, PA
Experienced with lakeside and older waterfront homes across Erie County. Reliable service through Erie's demanding winters with local trust built on 5-star reviews and word-of-mouth. Nearby: Millcreek, Harborcreek, Fairview, North East.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/erie-pa

### Buffalo, NY
Serving North Buffalo bungalows, Elmwood Village apartments, and suburban homes across Amherst, Cheektowaga, Tonawanda, and West Seneca. Familiar with Buffalo's historic housing stock and character homes. Reliable in any weather. Trusted by Erie County landlords and short-term rental owners.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/buffalo-ny

### Rochester, NY
Dependable cleaning for Monroe County — Park Avenue, Brighton, Pittsford, and greater Rochester. Trusted by Monroe County homeowners for recurring plans. Experienced with student rentals near RIT and University of Rochester. Flexible weekly and bi-weekly plans. Nearby: Brighton, Pittsford, Irondequoit, Henrietta.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/rochester-ny

### Syracuse, NY
Professional cleaning for Syracuse and Central NY including SU-area rentals and Onondaga County homes. Move-in/move-out turnovers, recurring plans, and small commercial. Reliable in every CNY season. Nearby: DeWitt, Liverpool, Camillus, Manlius.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/syracuse-ny

---

## Company

### About
Black Diamond Cleaning Solutions was founded by Joe, a rental property owner who experienced firsthand the frustrations of unreliable cleaning services — missed appointments, inconsistent quality, and poor communication. He launched Black Diamond to eliminate those headaches. Joe personally oversees the quality of every cleaning team. The company has served 500+ customers and earned a 4.9-star Google rating in its first year of operation.
URL: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/about

### Values
- **Reliability:** We honor every appointment. No surprises.
- **Consistency:** The same premium quality, every single clean.
- **Care:** We treat your home like our own.

### Team Practices
- Trained, background-checked cleaners
- Detailed checklists on every visit
- Reliable scheduling and real-time text communication
- Fully licensed and insured

---
